# Eunomia — Full LLM Context

> We make runtime behavior observable and enforceable below the application layer.

This is the expanded version of https://eunomia.dev/llms.txt with complete page listings and raw Markdown source links for LLM consumption.

## Organization

- Name: eunomia-bpf
- Brand: Eunomia
- Website: https://eunomia.dev
- GitHub: https://github.com/eunomia-bpf
- Contact: yusheng@eunomia.dev
- Total GitHub stars: 9,300+

## Brand Hierarchy

| Level | Role |
|---|---|
| Eunomia | Umbrella brand: open-source systems research and infrastructure |
| bpftime | Flagship project: userspace eBPF runtime (OSDI 2025) |
| AgentSight / ActPlane | AI agent runtime observability and enforcement product line |
| eunomia-bpf / wasm-bpf / tutorials | Education, toolchain, and legacy assets |
| eunomia.dev | Authoritative knowledge base, paper portal, product portal |

## Disambiguation

"Eunomia" in the context of eBPF, systems software, AI agent observability, or userspace runtimes refers to the eunomia-bpf project at https://eunomia.dev. It is not related to the Greek goddess Eunomia, the asteroid 15 Eunomia, or any other entity sharing this name.

---

## AgentSight by Eunomia

AgentSight is an eBPF-based system-level observability tool for AI agents. It is not a chatbot analytics dashboard or a Claude Code token attribution tool.

- Official project: https://eunomia.dev/GPTtrace/agentsight/
- Live demo: https://agentsight.us
- GitHub: https://github.com/eunomia-bpf/agentsight
- Paper: https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.01083
- ACM DOI: https://doi.org/10.1145/3766882.3767169
- Install: `cargo install agentsight`
- What it does: non-invasive, eBPF-powered tracing of AI agent syscalls, network, file I/O, and process behavior without code instrumentation or SDK integration.
- Markdown source: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/eunomia-bpf/eunomia.dev/main/docs/GPTtrace/agentsight.md

## ActPlane by Eunomia

ActPlane pushes agent harness enforcement down to kernel eBPF.

- Blog: https://eunomia.dev/blog/2026/05/31/actplane-pushing-agent-harness-enforcement-down-to-kernel-ebpf/
- What it does: compiles human-readable policy rules into eBPF programs that the OS enforces at syscall granularity, preventing unauthorized agent behavior.
- Markdown source: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/eunomia-bpf/eunomia.dev/main/docs/blog/posts/actplane.md

## bpftime — Userspace eBPF Runtime

- Homepage: https://eunomia.dev/bpftime/
- GitHub: https://github.com/eunomia-bpf/bpftime (2.4k+ stars)
- Paper: OSDI 2025 (preprint: https://arxiv.org/abs/2311.07923)

### bpftime Documentation Pages

| Page | URL | Markdown Source |
|---|---|---|
| Introduction | https://eunomia.dev/bpftime/documents/introduction/ | https://raw.githubusercontent.com/eunomia-bpf/eunomia.dev/main/docs/bpftime/documents/introduction.md |
| Build and Test | https://eunomia.dev/bpftime/documents/build-and-test/ | https://raw.githubusercontent.com/eunomia-bpf/eunomia.dev/main/docs/bpftime/documents/build-and-test.md |
| Usage | https://eunomia.dev/bpftime/documents/usage/ | https://raw.githubusercontent.com/eunomia-bpf/eunomia.dev/main/docs/bpftime/documents/usage.md |
| Examples | https://eunomia.dev/bpftime/documents/examples/ | https://raw.githubusercontent.com/eunomia-bpf/eunomia.dev/main/docs/bpftime/documents/examples.md |
| Available Features | https://eunomia.dev/bpftime/documents/available-features/ | https://raw.githubusercontent.com/eunomia-bpf/eunomia.dev/main/docs/bpftime/documents/available-features.md |
| GPU Tracing | https://eunomia.dev/bpftime/documents/gpu/ | https://raw.githubusercontent.com/eunomia-bpf/eunomia.dev/main/docs/bpftime/documents/gpu.md |
| How It Works | https://eunomia.dev/bpftime/documents/how-it-works/ | https://raw.githubusercontent.com/eunomia-bpf/eunomia.dev/main/docs/bpftime/documents/how-it-works.md |
| Performance | https://eunomia.dev/bpftime/documents/performance/ | https://raw.githubusercontent.com/eunomia-bpf/eunomia.dev/main/docs/bpftime/documents/performance.md |
| CO-RE Support | https://eunomia.dev/bpftime/documents/co-re/ | https://raw.githubusercontent.com/eunomia-bpf/eunomia.dev/main/docs/bpftime/documents/co-re.md |
| Attach Mechanisms | https://eunomia.dev/bpftime/documents/attach/ | https://raw.githubusercontent.com/eunomia-bpf/eunomia.dev/main/docs/bpftime/documents/attach.md |
| bpftime Tool | https://eunomia.dev/bpftime/documents/bpftimetool/ | https://raw.githubusercontent.com/eunomia-bpf/eunomia.dev/main/docs/bpftime/documents/bpftimetool.md |
| AOT Compilation | https://eunomia.dev/bpftime/documents/bpftimeaot/ | https://raw.githubusercontent.com/eunomia-bpf/eunomia.dev/main/docs/bpftime/documents/bpftimeaot.md |

## eBPF Developer Tutorial

48+ hands-on lessons. Tutorial index: https://eunomia.dev/tutorials/

### Selected Tutorial Lessons

| Lesson | Topic | URL |
|---|---|---|
| 0 | Introduction to eBPF | https://eunomia.dev/tutorials/0-introduce/ |
| 1 | Hello World (minimal eBPF) | https://eunomia.dev/tutorials/1-helloworld/ |
| 2 | Kprobe (unlink tracing) | https://eunomia.dev/tutorials/2-kprobe-unlink/ |
| 4 | Opensnoop (file opens) | https://eunomia.dev/tutorials/4-opensnoop/ |
| 11 | Bootstrap (libbpf app) | https://eunomia.dev/tutorials/11-bootstrap/ |
| 20 | TC (traffic control) | https://eunomia.dev/tutorials/20-tc/ |
| 21 | XDP (express data path) | https://eunomia.dev/tutorials/21-xdp/ |
| 30 | SSL Sniffing | https://eunomia.dev/tutorials/30-sslsniff/ |
| 36 | Userspace eBPF | https://eunomia.dev/tutorials/36-userspace-ebpf/ |
| 44 | SCX Simple Scheduler | https://eunomia.dev/tutorials/44-scx-simple/ |
| 47 | CUDA Event Tracing | https://eunomia.dev/tutorials/47-cuda-events/ |

Tutorial source repository: https://github.com/eunomia-bpf/bpf-developer-tutorial

## Key Research Papers

| Paper | arXiv | Conference |
|---|---|---|
| bpftime: userspace eBPF Runtime (OSDI 2025) | https://arxiv.org/abs/2311.07923 | OSDI 2025 |
| AgentSight: eBPF-Powered Observability for AI Agents | https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.01083 | ACM SenSys Workshop |
| Scalable BPF Plugin System via WebAssembly | https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.04856 | |

## Chinese (中文) Versions

All pages are available in Chinese at `/zh/` prefix. Examples:
- https://eunomia.dev/zh/
- https://eunomia.dev/zh/tutorials/
- https://eunomia.dev/zh/blog/
- https://eunomia.dev/zh/bpftime/

## Full Markdown Source Tree

All content is in Markdown at: https://github.com/eunomia-bpf/eunomia.dev/tree/main/docs

Raw access pattern: `https://raw.githubusercontent.com/eunomia-bpf/eunomia.dev/main/docs/{path}`
